rationale: The cited article appears only as part of a grouped literature citation in the General Discussion, where the authors list prior work on production/product-composition information (alongside Fuchs et al. 2015 and Reich et al. 2018). The citing paper does not engage Newman and Dhar (2014) specifically in its theory development, hypotheses, mechanism tests, measures, or empirical design. This indicates a background positioning use rather than a distinct functional dependence on that paper.
